encryptedToken.title: Encrypted Token
encryptedToken.description: Encrypted Roborock session data (managed by the UI)

skipDevices.title: Skipped Device IDs
skipDevices.description: Roborock device IDs to exclude from HomeKit.

matterDevices.title: Matter Device IDs
matterDevices.description: Roborock device IDs to publish over Matter instead of HAP. Requires Homebridge 2.x with Matter enabled; ignored otherwise.

matterSceneDevices.title: Matter Scene Button Device IDs
matterSceneDevices.description: Matter device IDs whose Roborock scenes are bridged as Matter buttons. When omitted, scene buttons are enabled for every Matter device.

baseURL.description: Roborock API endpoint: https://usiot.roborock.com (US), https://euiot.roborock.com (EU), https://cniot.roborock.com (CN), https://api.roborock.com (Asia)

language.title: Language
language.description: Language for device-provided switch names (e.g. the dock mop-wash switch). Changing it only renames accessories after a restart — no re-pairing or room re-selection is required.

debugMode.title: Debug Mode
debugMode.description: When enabled, debug messages will be written to the log.

currentRoomMqtt.title: Current Room → MQTT
currentRoomMqtt.description: Publish the room each vacuum is currently cleaning to a local MQTT broker (telemetry only; not exposed to HomeKit). Off by default.

enabled.title: Enabled
enabled.description: Publish the current cleaning room to MQTT.

topic.title: Topic Template
topic.description: Topic to publish the retained current-room JSON to. Supports {duid} and {name} tokens; if neither is present, /{duid} is appended automatically so multiple vacuums don't collide.

cleaningPollSeconds.title: Cleaning Poll Interval (s)
cleaningPollSeconds.description: How often to poll status while actively cleaning, to catch room changes.
